flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Davenport University fell 85% between 2006 and 2009 (11.9% → 1.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at Davenport University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.2k vs 4.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Davenport University fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9k → 3.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Davenport University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.0k → $24.5k).
